script: TENANT=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c; APP_ID=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name aixa-bot-app-id --query value -o tsv 2>&1); echo "APP_ID=$APP_ID"; SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name aixa-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv 2>&1); echo "SECRET length=${#SECRET}"; echo; echo '===== Direct BF token request — raw response =====' && curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP_ID" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SECRET" --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default' | jq '{error, error_description, error_codes, timestamp}' 2>&1 && echo && echo '===== When does the secret expire (if we can read attribs) =====' && az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name aixa-bot-client-secret --query 'attributes' 2>&1 | head -20 && echo && echo '===== Client secrets on this app reg (if the proxy user has app-read) =====' && az ad app credential list --id $APP_ID 2>&1 | head -30 || echo '(no permission to list app credentials)'
